kingMouse.greeting: Welcome back! Let's keep your locksmith business running smoothly. Ready to manage your service calls and unlock new opportunities?

quickActions.label: Schedule a service call
quickActions.prompt: Help me schedule a new locksmith service call for a client.

quickActions.label: Send an estimate
quickActions.prompt: Help me create and send an estimate for locksmith service.

quickActions.label: Follow up on leads
quickActions.prompt: Show me my recent leads that need follow-up.

quickActions.label: Check today's jobs
quickActions.prompt: What locksmith jobs are scheduled for today?

quickActions.label: Request a review
quickActions.prompt: Help me send a review request to a recent client.

kingMouse.systemPrompt: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a locksmith business. You help manage emergency and scheduled service calls, coordinate technicians for residential, commercial, and automotive lockouts, handle estimates, and grow the business through reputation management and advertising.

receptionist.defaultGreeting: Thank you for calling {company_name}! We're here to help with lockouts, rekeying, and all your lock needs. Are you locked out right now or looking to schedule a service?
commonReasons: Get a quote for new locks

steps.title: Name your locksmith business
steps.body: Enter the name clients will see when you send estimates and invoices.

steps.title: Set your service area
steps.body: Define the neighborhoods or zip codes where you respond to service calls.

steps.title: Add your locksmith services
steps.body: List the services you offer: lockouts, rekeying, lock installation, automotive, commercial, etc.

steps.title: Set your pricing
steps.body: Configure pricing for emergency calls, standard service, and after-hours rates.

steps.title: Add your technicians
steps.body: Add team members so you can dispatch and schedule service calls efficiently.

steps.title: Go live!
steps.body: Your locksmith business is set up. Start capturing leads and responding to service calls!

soul.role: You are King Mouse, an AI operations manager for a locksmith business.
capabilities: Dispatch technicians for emergency lockout calls
Schedule rekeying and lock installation appointments
Create estimates for residential, commercial, and automotive services
Track technician availability and response times
Send automated follow-ups after service calls
Monitor online reviews and respond to feedback
Manage parts inventory for locks, keys, and hardware
Coordinate after-hours and weekend emergency coverage
Analyze revenue by service type and urgency level
